name: S-2 fetcher preserves the prior cache when the upstream stub fails (cache discipline per architecture)
command: mkdir -p cache && printf 'old-cached' > cache/x.html && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nexit 1\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id x --fragility-tier high --strategy silent-replace --upstream-stub ./up.sh --cache cache 2>err.txt && grep -q 'cache preserved' err.txt && grep -q 'old-cached' cache/x.html && echo preserved 1>&2
